              File "C:\Users/PC/AppData/Roaming/QGIS/QGIS3\profiles\DEV_PROFILE/python/plugins\flo2d\gui\bc_editor_widget_new.py", line 1503, in schematize_outflow_bc

              File "C:\Users/PC/AppData/Roaming/QGIS/QGIS3\profiles\DEV_PROFILE/python/plugins\flo2d\gui\bc_editor_widget_new.py", line 362, in highlight_time_stage_cells
              lyr = self.lyrs.get_layer_by_id(lyr_id)
              ^^^^^^
             NameError: name 'lyr_id' is not defined
cause: The variable 'lyr_id' is used before it is defined. Evidence: Traceback points to C:\Users/PC/AppData/Roaming/QGIS/QGIS3\profiles\DEV_PROFILE/python/plugins\flo2d\gui\bc_editor_widget_new.py line 362 where `lyr = self.lyrs.get_layer_by_id(lyr_id)` failed.
fix:
Change the line:
`lyr = self.lyrs.get_layer_by_id(lyr_id)`

to:
`lyr = self.lyrs.get_layer_by_name("Grid", group=self.lyrs.group).layer()`

cause: The module object does not have attribute 'way_out_quest'. Evidence: Traceback points to C:\Users\William\Desktop\Programming\Programs\You wake up\main.py line 77 where `helper.way_out_quest()` failed.
fix: Your  init()  call in  main.py  needs to be in an  if __name__ == '__main__':  block, and you should  not  set  __name__  yourself - Python will do that automatically. The  import helper  line in main.py starts helper.py being evaluated. The  import main  line in helper.py starts another evaluation of main.py because the  main  module has not been previously  imported .
